band_change_detail: Remains Developing (28.4 -> 22.8); does not cross the 20/21 Critical boundary.
key_evidence: State lethal force against protesters: 4 killed and 127+ detained over a 6th consecutive week of nationwide protests against the worst economic crisis in four decades; a documented BND/E4 boundary violation (use of lethal force against civilians) and EQU harm against indigenous/worker demonstrators. (euronews.com, 2026-06-03)

Criminalization of dissent at Tier 2-3: terrorism and narco-funding charges filed against COB (national labor federation) executive secretary Mario Argullo and 24 other union leaders -- an AB1 deflection / AB4 weaponization of the justice apparatus against organized civil society, depressing ACC and INT.

Governance instability signal: resignations of the Defense Minister and Education Minister (June 2) amid the unrest, indicating the state's recognition-and-response apparatus is in flux rather than absent.

Root driver is a land-mortgage law triggering an indigenous/worker uprising -- a structural EQU/EMP failure distinct from priced chronic fragility; this is NEW state-attributable repression, not continuation.
methodology_ruling: STATE-REPRESSION-IN-FLUX (SCORABLE). Unlike the conflict-driven 0.0 floors (Sudan, Myanmar) or filed-but-unadjudicated corporate matters, Bolivia is a non-floor Developing entity (28.4) where the June 2026 evidence supplies NEW state-attributable harm: lethal force against protesters (4 dead), mass detention (127+), and the criminalization of labor leadership via terrorism/narco charges. These reveal un-priced ACC (criminalizing dissent 1.8->1.4), BND (lethal boundary violation 2.3->1.9), EQU (repression of indigenous/worker claimants 1.9->1.6), EMP (2.4->2.0) and INT (justice-apparatus weaponization 2.0->1.7) harm; AWR/ACT/SYS held (state institutions still functioning, ministers resigning rather than the apparatus collapsing). Defensible modeled downgrade reaches -5.6, clearing the 5-point threshold while remaining in Developing (no band crossing). Confidence medium: Tier 2-3 reporting, evolving situation, charges filed-not-adjudicated -- the magnitude rests on the directly-attested deaths/detentions, not the charges' eventual outcome.
